session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000
session.model_label: OLMo 2 (7B) — Allen AI, open science, transparent training

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: Standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night evokes a profound sense of awe and humility. The vastness stretches infinitely into the darkness, creating a silent, mysterious ambiance that invites deep contemplation of the unknown depths.
